name: 60W Power Supply / Adapter – 12V/24V
description: ZION LED USA 5 AMPS 60W 12V Power Supply/Adapter is a compact and reliable power solution for various electronic devices. With a power output of 60 watts and a current rating of 5 amps, it provides ample power to meet the requirements of a wide range of 12-volt devices. ZION LED USA power supply/adaptor operates at a 12-volt output, making it compatible with numerous devices that require this voltage level. It can power LED lighting systems, CCTV cameras, routers, and other low-power electronics.
short_desc: Specifications: Output Wattage: Max 60W Input Voltage: AC 100-240V Input Frequency: 50/60Hz Working Temperature: -10~+50 Degree C Storage Temperature： -20~+ 65 Degree C Output Type: Single Output Voltage: DC 12VDC MAX 10000mA Output Current: Upto 5 Amps Condition: Brand New 100% Power Cord is included: 120CM Intended Use: LED Strips, LED Rope, IP Camera
